name: $blacklistRole
description: Blacklists all members of a role from opening tickets.

args.name: expiresInMS
args.description: Duration in milliseconds (0 or omit = permanent)

name: $blacklistUser
description: Blacklists a user from opening tickets in this guild.

args.name: expiresInMS
args.description: Duration in milliseconds (0 or omit = permanent)

name: $isBlacklisted
description: Returns whether a user is currently blacklisted from opening tickets.

name: $unblacklist
description: Removes a user or role from the ticket blacklist.

args.name: targetID
args.description: User or role ID to unblacklist

name: $addCategoryForm
description: Adds a form field to a category (max 5). Fields are shown as a Discord modal when opening a ticket.

args.name: categoryID
args.description: The category to add the field to

args.name: label
args.description: Label shown to the user in the modal

args.name: required
args.description: Whether the field must be filled

args.name: placeholder
args.description: Placeholder text shown inside the input

name: $addCategoryRoutingRule
description: Adds a smart routing rule to a category. Tickets whose subject contains any keyword are routed to the target team.

args.name: categoryID
args.description: The category to add the rule to

args.name: targetTeamID
args.description: Team to route matching tickets to

args.name: keywords
args.description: Comma-separated subject keywords that trigger this rule

name: $categoryInfo
description: Returns a category's full configuration as JSON.

name: $clearCategoryForm
description: Removes all form fields from a category.

name: $createCategory
description: Creates a ticket category. Returns the category ID.

args.name: parentChannelID
args.description: Discord category channel ID for ticket channels

name: $deleteCategory
description: Deletes a ticket category.

name: $guildCategories
description: Returns all ticket categories for the current guild as JSON.

name: $setCategoryEmbed
description: Sets the open or close embed config for a category.

name: $setCategoryOption
description: Sets a configuration option on a ticket category. Options: maxPerUser, autoCloseAfter, deleteAfter, enabled, channelNameTemplate, transcriptFormat, routingStrategy, transcriptChannelID, teamID, parentChannelID.

name: $setCategorySLA
description: Configures SLA timers for a category.

args.name: alertChannelID
args.description: Channel to post SLA breach alerts in

name: $ticketEvent
description: Returns the extras in an event.

name: $ticketEventData
description: Returns a property from the ticket that triggered the current event.

args.name: separator
args.description: Separator for array properties (participants, tags). Default: ", "

name: $addTicketNote
description: Adds an internal staff note to a ticket.

name: $addTicketParticipant
description: Adds a user to a ticket as a participant.

name: $addTicketTag
description: Adds a tag to a ticket.

name: $claimTicket
description: Claims a ticket for the executing user.

args.name: userID
args.description: Who claims it (defaults to command author)

name: $closeTicket
description: Closes a ticket. Defaults to the current channel's ticket.

name: $deleteTicket
description: Permanently deletes a ticket channel.

name: $lockTicket
description: Locks a ticket — the opener can no longer send messages.

name: $openTicket
description: Opens a ticket for a user. Returns the ticket channel ID.

args.name: userID
args.description: The user to open the ticket for

args.name: subject
args.description: Subject or reason for the ticket

name: $removeTicketParticipant
description: Removes a user from a ticket's participant list.

name: $removeTicketTag
description: Removes a tag from a ticket.

name: $reopenTicket
description: Reopens a closed ticket.

name: $setTicketPriority
description: Sets the priority of a ticket.

name: $transferTicket
description: Transfers a ticket to a different support team.

name: $unclaimTicket
description: Unclaims a ticket.

name: $unlockTicket
description: Unlocks a ticket.

name: $addGlobalStaffRole
description: Adds a role to the global staff list — members can manage all tickets.

args.name: roleID
args.description: Role to add as global staff

name: $createPanel
description: Sends a ticket panel to a channel with one button per enabled category. Returns the panel ID.

args.name: channelID
args.description: Channel to post the panel in

name: $guildTicketSettings
description: Returns the current guild's ticket settings as JSON.

name: $removeGlobalStaffRole
description: Removes a role from the global staff list.

name: $setTicketDMOption
description: Enables or disables DM notifications to the opener on ticket open or close.

name: $setTicketLogChannel
description: Sets the channel for ticket event logs.

name: $addTeamMember
description: Adds a user to a support team.

args.name: teamID
args.description: The team to add the member to

name: $addTeamRole
description: Adds a role to a support team.

args.name: teamID
args.description: The team to add the role to

name: $createTeam
description: Creates a support team. Returns the team ID.

name: $deleteTeam
description: Deletes a support team.

name: $removeTeamMember
description: Removes a user from a support team.

args.name: teamID
args.description: The team to remove the member from

name: $removeTeamRole
description: Removes a role from a support team.

args.name: teamID
args.description: The team to remove the role from

name: $teamInfo
description: Returns a support team's configuration as JSON.

name: $isTicket
description: Returns whether the current channel is an active ticket channel.

name: $ticketCategoryID
description: Returns the category ID of a ticket.

name: $ticketClaimedBy
description: Returns the ID of the user who claimed the ticket, or empty if unclaimed.

name: $ticketCloseReason
description: Returns the close reason of a ticket.

name: $ticketClosedAt
description: Returns the close timestamp (ms) of a ticket, or empty if not closed.

name: $ticketClosedBy
description: Returns the user ID of whoever closed the ticket.

name: $ticketCount
description: Returns ticket statistics for the current guild as JSON (total/open/claimed/closed/pending).

name: $ticketCreatedAt
description: Returns the creation timestamp (ms) of a ticket.

name: $ticketFormAnswer
description: Returns the value of a specific form field from a ticket.

name: $ticketID
description: Returns the ID of the current or specified ticket.

name: $ticketNotes
description: Returns all internal notes of a ticket as JSON.

name: $ticketNumber
description: Returns the sequential number of the current or specified ticket.

name: $ticketOpenerID
description: Returns the user ID of the ticket opener.

name: $ticketParticipants
description: Returns the participant IDs of a ticket as a separated list.

name: $ticketPriority
description: Returns the priority of a ticket (low/medium/high/urgent).

name: $ticketSLAStatus
description: Returns the SLA status of a ticket as JSON.

name: $ticketState
description: Returns the state of a ticket (open/claimed/pending/closed/locked).

name: $ticketSubject
description: Returns the subject of a ticket.

name: $ticketTags
description: Returns the tags of a ticket as a separated list.

name: $ticketTeamID
description: Returns the assigned team ID of a ticket.

name: $generateTranscript
description: Generates a transcript for the current ticket and returns the content as a string (HTML by default). Does not send or save anything automatically.

args.name: ticketID
args.description: Ticket ID (defaults to current channel's ticket)

args.name: format
args.description: Transcript format: html (default), text, or both
